description: Resource Type definition for AWS::CloudWatch::InsightRule. Creates a Contributor Insights rule that analyzes log data to identify top contributors and usage patterns.

RuleName.markdownDescription:
---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Update requires: Replacement

RuleState.markdownDescription:
---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: ENABLED | DISABLED  
Update requires: No interruption

RuleBody.markdownDescription:
---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption

ApplyOnTransformedLogs.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: Boolean  
Update requires: No interruption

Tags.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

Arn.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption

Value.markdownDescription:

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
